title: AI 行业简报 2026-05-21
summary: 今天筛出 16 个事件：大厂动态 5 条，技术进展 1 条，行业观点 10 条；另读 Hugging Face Papers 5 篇。

worth_tracking.title: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.
worth_tracking.brief: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete。看点在产品自动化：能不能把工具调用、权限和结果校验做成可靠闭环。
worth_tracking.social_original_text: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.
worth_tracking.translation_zh: Exa 是我给所有 Agent 最信任的工具。我们在 YC 用它，在我的所有 OpenClaw 和 Hermes Agent 里也用它。没有别的选择能同时做到这么快、这么可靠、这么完整。
evidence_titles: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.

worth_tracking.title: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.
worth_tracking.brief: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here。看点在产品自动化：能不能把工具调用、权限和结果校验做成可靠闭环。
worth_tracking.social_original_text: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.
worth_tracking.translation_zh: 虽然说得很晚，但回头看，@sama 那句神话般的“做一个会随着模型变强而变得更好的业务”，基本上就是我在这里说的 Agent Labs。
evidence_titles: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.

items.title: Mega-ASR: Towards In-the-wild2 Speech Recognition via Scaling Up Real-world Acoustic Simulation
items.title_zh: Mega-ASR: Towards In-the-wild2 Speech Recognition via Scaling Up Real-world Acoustic Simulation
items.takeaway_zh: 《Mega-ASR: Towards In-the-wild2 Speech Recognition via Scaling Up Real-world Acoustic Simulation》探索多模态理解、生成或跨模态推理的新方法。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 它可能影响 Agent 训练、推理策略或任务自动化能力。

items.title: Enhancing Train-Free Infinite-Frame Generation for Consistent Long Videos
items.title_zh: Enhancing Train-Free Infinite-Frame Generation for Consistent Long Videos
items.takeaway_zh: 《Enhancing Train-Free Infinite-Frame Generation for Consistent Long Videos》研究模型如何自适应地产生和使用记忆。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 它可能影响 Agent 训练、推理策略或任务自动化能力。

items.title: IndusAgent: Reinforcing Open-Vocabulary Industrial Anomaly Detection with Agentic Tools
items.title_zh: IndusAgent: Reinforcing Open-Vocabulary Industrial Anomaly Detection with Agentic Tools
items.takeaway_zh: 《IndusAgent: Reinforcing Open-Vocabulary Industrial Anomaly Detection with Agentic Tools》围绕推理过程建模，探索更强的递归式问题求解。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 它可能影响 Agent 训练、推理策略或任务自动化能力。

items.title: OScaR: The Occam’s Razor for Extreme KV Cache Quantization in LLMs and Beyond
items.title_zh: OScaR: The Occam’s Razor for Extreme KV Cache Quantization in LLMs and Beyond
items.takeaway_zh: 《OScaR: The Occam’s Razor for Extreme KV Cache Quantization in LLMs and Beyond》研究模型如何自适应地产生和使用记忆。
items.why_it_matters_zh: 它可能影响 Agent 训练、推理策略或任务自动化能力。

items.title: You Only Need Minimal RLVR Training: Extrapolating LLMs via Rank-1 Trajectories
items.title_zh: You Only Need Minimal RLVR Training: Extrapolating LLMs via Rank-1 Trajectories
items.takeaway_zh: 《You Only Need Minimal RLVR Training: Extrapolating LLMs via Rank-1 Trajectories》把生成模型推进到几何、3D 或动作生成场景。

items.title: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.
items.brief: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete。看点在产品自动化：能不能把工具调用、权限和结果校验做成可靠闭环。
items.social_original_text: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.
items.translation_zh: Exa 是我给所有 Agent 最信任的工具。我们在 YC 用它，在我的所有 OpenClaw 和 Hermes Agent 里也用它。没有别的选择能同时做到这么快、这么可靠、这么完整。
evidence_titles: Exa is what I trust for all my agents. We use it at YC. We use it in all my OpenClaw and Hermes Agents. There is no other option that is as fast, as reliable, and as complete.

items.title: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.
items.brief: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here。看点在产品自动化：能不能把工具调用、权限和结果校验做成可靠闭环。
items.social_original_text: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.
items.translation_zh: 虽然说得很晚，但回头看，@sama 那句神话般的“做一个会随着模型变强而变得更好的业务”，基本上就是我在这里说的 Agent Labs。
evidence_titles: very belated but in retrospect i think @sama's mythical "build a business that gets better when models get better" is basically what I called Agent Labs here.
